title: thalictrum minus subsp. carpaticum
intro: Thalictrum minus subsp. carpaticum, also known as meadow rue, is a perennial plant belonging to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae) that is native to the Carpathian Mountains in Europe. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of meadow rue include reducing inflammation and pain, improving respiratory issues, and promoting relaxation. Herbal preparations of meadow rue include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to address various health concerns, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional.
